hooks.command: if printf '%s' "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(^|&&|;|\|)\s*git\s+.*--(no-verify|no-gpg-sign)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: --no-verify and --no-gpg-sign flags are not allowed. Run the commit without bypass flags so that pre-commit and commit-msg hooks execute properly. See .claude/rules/02-git-discipline.md.' >&2; exit 2; fi
